# Agents

This folder contains **AI assistant definitions** for the Contact API project. These are special instruction files that tell VS Code's AI helper how to best assist with this particular project.

Think of them as a **job description** for the AI — they explain what the project is about so the AI can give better, more relevant help.

## Files

| File | What It Does |
|---|---|
| `contact-api.agent.md` | A specialist AI assistant trained to help with the Contact API project |

## About the Contact API Agent

- **What it does:** Helps you build, debug, and understand the Contact API code
- **How to use it:** You can call on this agent directly when you need help with the project
- **What it can do:** Read files and search through the code (but it won't make changes on its own)
- **Where it learns about the project:** It reads the [`ContactApi/context/`](../ContactApi/context/) folder to understand the project's purpose, design, and implementation details
